title: Deploy backend services to Raspberry Pi cluster
description: Deploy backend services (Ledger, Registry, Queue, Cache, Service Mesh, Config, Events) to Raspberry Pi cluster at: lucidia (192.168.4.38), blackroad-pi (192.168.4.64). Use Docker Swarm or K3s for orchestration. Services should communicate via mesh network. Each Pi has 8GB RAM. Can handle 5-10 lightweight services each.
